purpose: Post-research contamination guard. When a diocesan research job writes to Leads from Research, every extracted email domain should be checked against this list. Matches indicate the row was actually a public-district leak (BUG 5 shared-city gap) and should be deleted.

pattern_matches._comment: Regex-style patterns — if a diocesan lead's email domain matches any of these, flag as public-district contamination

per_diocese_exclusions._comment: When research targets a specific diocese, any email on one of these domains is automatically a contamination hit. Keyed by the canonical account name in Prospecting Queue.

whitelisted_diocesan_domains._comment: Known-good archdiocesan and parochial school domains seen in Session 58 research. Use as a positive signal when checking an uncertain row.

usage_example_python:
import json, re
bl = json.load(open('memory/public_district_email_blocklist.json'))
def is_public_leak(email: str, diocese_name: str) -> bool:
    dom = email.lower().split('@')[-1]
    if dom in bl['exact_domains']: return True
    if dom in bl['per_diocese_exclusions'].get(diocese_name, []): return True
    for pat in bl['pattern_matches']['patterns']:
        if re.match(pat, dom): return True
    return False
